name: Cozido à Portuguesa
description: Portugal's grand boiled dinner — a slow-cooked pot of meats, sausages, vegetables, and chickpeas.

recipeInstructions.text: Place beef and pork ribs in a large pot, cover with cold water, and bring to a boil. Skim foam, then simmer for 1 hour.
Add chouriço, morcela, and bacon. Continue cooking for 45 minutes.
Add potatoes, carrots, turnips, and chickpeas. Cook for 20 minutes.
Add cabbage and kale. Cook for a further 15 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
Remove everything and slice the meats. Serve on a large platter with the vegetables and broth alongside for dipping.

notes.title: Serving tradition
notes.text: Cozido is traditionally served in courses: first the broth as soup, then the meats and vegetables.
